subparts.text: Two fair dice are thrown. Find the probability of getting doubles or the sum of 7?
For a moderately skewed distribution, the mean and median are respectively 26.8 and 27.9. What is the mode of the distribution?

An aircraft maintenance company bought an equipment for detecting structural defects in aircrafts the equipment detects defects and give alarm when they actually exist is 95% while if gives false alarm in 1% of the tests. If 2% of the aircrafts actually have structural defects, what is the probability that an aircraft actually has a structural defect given that the equipment gives an alarm?
